prompt: Classify the sentiment of this review: The food arrived quickly and tasted amazing, but the delivery fee was outrageous and the app kept freezing.
Classify the sentiment of this review and justify your answer: Absolutely love this vacuum - it picks up everything and the battery lasts forever.
Classify the sentiment of this comment: The checkout process kept crashing and support never replied. Total waste of money.
Determine the sentiment of this feedback and explain why: The hotel room was spotless and the staff friendly, yet the constant street noise made sleeping nearly impossible.
This function should count how many times a word appears in a sentence, ignoring case, but it fails: def count_word(sentence, word): return sentence.split().count(word). Fix it.
This function should check if a number is even but returns wrong results: def is_even(n): return n % 2 == 1. Find and fix the bug.
This function should return a list reversed without modifying the original, but it does not work as intended: def reversed_copy(lst): lst.reverse(); return lst. Fix it.
Write a Python function that returns True if a string is a palindrome, ignoring case and spaces.
Write a Python function that finds the most frequent element in a list; if there is a tie, return any one of the most frequent.
